title: How do I update my privacy and visibility profile settings in the Student Hub?
plain_text: Students can modify their privacy settings to limit the visibility of particular information on their student profiles. When other students visit that profile, the information that has been set to invisible will be hidden. On the Discover page, the student profile does not appear in applicable searches if some information is set to invisible. Some information, like name, student email, and campus, is always visible. View and change visibility settings. 1. Go to Student Hub > 'Me'. 2. Select 'Profile Visibility'. 3. Slide the indicators to allow desired information to be visible or invisible to others. Slide the indicator to the right (blue) to make the option visible. Slide the indicator to the left (grey) to make the option invisible.
body_html:
Students can modify their privacy settings to limit the visibility of particular information on their student profiles. When other students visit that profile, the information that has been set to invisible will be hidden. On the Discover page, the student profile does not appear in applicable searches if some information is set to invisible. Some information, like name, student email, and campus, is always visible.

View and change visibility settings

  • Go to Student Hub > 'Me'.
  • Select 'Profile Visibility'.
  • Slide the indicators to allow desired information to be visible or invisible to others.
  • Slide the indicator to the right (blue) to make the option visible.
  • Slide the indicator to the left (grey) to make the option invisible.
